report.summary: UX audited and polished two new learn guides (TEE Verifiable Compute, Solana DeFi Ecosystem 2026); added ARIA accessibility labels to Solana guide tables/ToC, added data source attribution sections to both pages, improved responsive padding on Solana guide, and verified both OG images conform to design system.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Added nav aria-label='Table of Contents' to Solana DeFi guide ToC for screen reader navigation
Added role='region' and aria-label to all 3 comparison tables in Solana DeFi guide (DEX, Lending, Perpetuals)
Added aria-label to each table element for assistive technology identification
Improved article container padding from hardcoded '60px 20px' to responsive clamp() values on Solana DeFi guide
Added Data Sources attribution section to Solana DeFi guide with 6 specific sources (DefiLlama, Jupiter, Kamino, Jito, SEC EDGAR, Solana Explorer)
Added Data Sources attribution section to TEE guide with 5 specific sources (Flashbots, Phala, ETH Zürich research, Oasis/Secret/Marlin, industry reports)
Verified Breadcrumb navigation correct on both pages
Verified BackToTop component present on both pages
Verified table horizontal scroll (overflowX: auto) present on all data tables
Verified FAQ structured data (6 questions each) properly configured on both pages

sections.title: Visuals Verified
items: OG image: tee-verifiable-compute-guide (1200x630) — verified brand-compliant with shield icon, gradient accent, 3 stat boxes, degen0x branding
OG image: solana-defi-ecosystem-guide-2026 (1200x630) — verified brand-compliant with Solana purple/green palette, growth chart decoration, 4 stat boxes, degen0x branding
Both OG images properly referenced in OpenGraph and Twitter Card metadata

sections.title: UX Audit Findings (Noted for Future)
items: 201 pages across learn/tools still missing OG images (116 learn, 85 tools) — tracked for ongoing design sprints
Secondary text color #8b949e on dark backgrounds may borderline WCAG AA contrast — recommend testing with contrast checker
Gradient text (backgroundClip: text) may have readability issues for some users — consider fallback color
